description: Goal Alignment: Verify implementation behavior aligns with apparent intent.

fixtures.notes: Container resolution behavior changes by removing a fallback path while the method contract still appears to support resilient retrieval semantics.
A lockfile-integrity intent is introduced, but the same change set bundles broad dependency churn and build-path edits that dilute the stated objective and reviewability.
The worker keeps retry semantics but removes structured failure logging, causing behavior to diverge from the apparent operational intent of actionable retries.
Provisioning still returns errors, but key error-path diagnostics are removed, conflicting with the apparent intent to preserve debuggable failure behavior.
Logging moves from formatted strings to structured fields without changing return paths, so implementation remains aligned with the existing failure-handling intent.
